children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, and generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present; generate a new patient_id; store patient data in patients database; return success with patient_id

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (patient_id), message

preconditions: patient_data contains name, dob, contact, insurance
postconditions: patient record exists in patients database

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients; check doctor availability at requested time; create appointment record in appointments database; return success with appointment_id

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (appointment_id), message

postconditions: appointment record exists in appointments database

children.name: RetrieveRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (list of records), message

postconditions: records are returned sorted by date descending

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields; if insurance changed, validate against external system
children.behavior: Update patient record in patients database with provided fields; if insurance field is present and different from current, validate via external system before saving; return success

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (updated fields), message

postconditions: patient record is updated in database

decomposition_rationale: Each child handles one of the four commands independently, covering the full responsibility of the parent. The parent routes based on command to the appropriate child, ensuring no sibling calls.
